title: Bajo el cielo andaluz
overview: Mrs. Sagrario Rivero is facing Rafael Montoro by the noise made at his forge. Rafael has a daughter who sings very well and Mrs. Sagrario takes this occasion to get rid of her annoying neighbor. She launches Maria Dolores artistically,and then, Rafael will be rich thanks to his daughter and will leave the business.
